ai_assist_summary:
RFP Name: Renewal of Support Services for SAP Systems (EN) / تجديد خدمات الدعم لأنظمة ساب (AR)

Issuing Entity: Saudi Industrial Development Fund (SIDF) via Etimad procurement platform.

Mandate: Renew and supply SAP software licenses and technical support services for a period of 24 months, covering all SAP modules currently deployed at SIDF including ERP, BW, Solution Manager, and GRC.

Scope of Work:
- Renew SAP software licenses for all deployed modules
- Provide Level 2 and Level 3 technical support
- Deliver quarterly system health checks
- Perform SAP kernel and support pack upgrades
- Provide on-site support staff (2 consultants, 5 days/week)
- Deliver knowledge transfer sessions to SIDF IT team

Deliverables:
- Signed SAP license renewal certificates
- Monthly support reports
- Quarterly health check reports
- Knowledge transfer documentation
- Incident resolution SLA compliance reports

Technical Evaluation Criteria (70%):
- Team qualifications and SAP certifications (25%)
- Technical approach and methodology (20%)
- Past experience with similar SAP support engagements (15%)
- Knowledge transfer plan (10%)

Financial Evaluation Criteria (30%):
- Total cost of ownership over 24 months (20%)
- Cost breakdown transparency (10%)

Compliance Requirements:
- Valid SAP partnership certification
- ISO 27001 certification
- Minimum 3 SAP-certified consultants on the team
- Saudization ratio >= 30%

Key Dates:
- Inquiry deadline: 2026-04-01
- Submission deadline: 2026-04-15
- Technical opening: 2026-04-20
- Expected award: 2026-05-15
- Service start: 2026-06-01

Submission Format: 2 sealed envelopes (technical + financial) via Etimad platform. Technical proposal max 50 pages.
user_notes: Focus on our Aramco SAP migration success story. Highlight the 6-month delivery timeline.
